title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
OIL +4.5% (24h) → $82 | Hormuz: US strikes into 7th night Jul 18; Strait transit ~30% of pre-war normal
US-Iran: Iran hit Kuwait water/desalination plants Sat — conflict expanding to Gulf infrastructure
BTC $64,646 (+1.1%), ETH $1,871 (+1.4%) — crypto holding; S&P 500 -1.0% (Fri close)
